metadata.description: AI-powered Chinese Word document formatter — generate properly formatted .docx files with correct 字体/字号/缩进/行距 directly from Claude, no browser or manual paste required.

plugins.name: word-format
plugins.description: Generate professionally formatted Chinese Word (.docx) documents directly from Claude. Supports Chinese typography standards (宋体/黑体/楷体, 字号, 首行缩进, 行距), reference document style matching, math formula handling via LaTeX+VBA, and common presets for 课题报告/政府公文/学术论文.
